assets/biome_map.png.role: Authoritative province-aligned biome class colour source
assets/biome_map.png.origin: Generated by tools/terrain/build_biome_map.py from the reviewed biome manifest
assets/biome_map.png.source_reference: WWF-derived Global Biomes ArcGIS feature layer recorded in the bake script and manifest
assets/biome_map.png.review_note: Record the exact upstream dataset licence and redistribution terms before release.

assets/color_lookup_map.png.role: Generated province colour to compact province-ID lookup
assets/color_lookup_map.png.origin: Generated from assets/provinces.bmp and definition data
assets/color_lookup_map.png.review_note: Reproducible, but commercial rights depend on the original province map.

assets/color_map.png.source_reference: Project country and historical ownership data
assets/color_map.png.review_note: Confirm provenance of imported historical country data before release.

assets/colormap_water.png.role: Ocean colour and bathymetric-looking presentation texture
assets/colormap_water.png.source_reference: No source or licence record found in the repository
assets/colormap_water.png.review_note: Must be sourced, licensed, or replaced with an internally generated water asset.

assets/definition.csv.role: Province colour and stable province definition source
assets/definition.csv.source_reference: No source or licence record found in the repository
assets/definition.csv.review_note: Critical dependency of province identity and every derived map bake.

assets/heightmap.png.role: Generated terrain elevation and displacement texture
assets/heightmap.png.source_reference: NASA Earth Observatory / GEBCO source URL recorded in the script
assets/heightmap.png.review_note: Archive exact source version, terms, download hash, and attribution decision.

assets/label_territory_map.png.role: Generated conservative province-ID raster for label fitting
assets/label_territory_map.png.review_note: Output is deterministic; original province-map rights remain unresolved.

assets/mask_political_map.png.origin: Generated from province and political data
assets/mask_political_map.png.review_note: Generated output must stay synchronized with its source hashes.

assets/noise.tres.role: Procedural noise configuration used by the final map material

assets/provinces.bmp.role: Authoritative province-colour topology and land/water source
assets/provinces.bmp.source_reference: No source or licence record found in the repository
assets/provinces.bmp.review_note: Release blocker until ownership or a replacement path is documented.

assets/terrain_base_map.png.role: Generated macro terrain colour presentation texture
assets/terrain_base_map.png.source_reference: Inherits biome and height source provenance
assets/terrain_base_map.png.review_note: Reproducible after biome and height sources are approved.

assets/terrain_class_map.png.origin: Generated from province ownership and terrain exclusions
assets/terrain_class_map.png.review_note: Treat as lossless data rather than colour artwork.

assets/fonts/LibreBaskerville-Variable.t.origin: Unmodified Libre Baskerville variable font from Google Fonts
